step_rationale: Amino acid biomarker for AMI and ACS; altered in acute myocardial necrosis and metabolic derangement.
mechanism: Essential amino acid dysregulation in acute MI reflecting altered cardiac protein turnover and ischemic metabolic shift.

references.title: The Diagnostic Value of Bile Acids and Amino Acids in Differentiating Acute Coronary Syndromes.
Exploring Novel Biomarkers for an Acute Coronary Syndrome Diagnosis Utilizing Plasma Metabolomics.
Improved Risk Prediction of Acute Myocardial Infarction in Patients With Stable Coronary Artery Disease Using an Amino Acid-Assisted Model.
